vision: Conversational infrastructure orchestration — manage servers, deploy apps, run scripts, and monitor health from a single control panel

completed.name: Server Management
completed.description: CRUD for servers with SSH key association, provider/region tracking, and status monitoring

completed.name: SSH Key Management
completed.description: Encrypted SSH key storage with fingerprint extraction, key type detection

completed.name: SSH Connection & Execution
completed.description: Remote command execution via Net::SSH with streaming support for real-time output

completed.name: Script Provisioning System
completed.description: Built-in and custom scripts with live execution streaming via ActionCable

completed.name: App Deployment Pipeline
completed.description: Docker-based app deployment with git clone, build, health check, and real-time log streaming

completed.name: Container Status Tracking
completed.description: Docker inspect-based container status sync with health indicators

completed.name: Server Metrics Collection
completed.description: CPU, memory, disk metrics via SSH with freshness tracking

completed.name: Database Backups to S3/R2
completed.description: pg_dump with gzip, upload to Cloudflare R2 or AWS S3, scheduled with retention

completed.name: Credential Management
completed.description: Encrypted cloud provider credentials (Cloudflare, AWS, Hetzner, etc.)

completed.name: AI Conversation System
completed.description: Claude-powered assistant for infrastructure operations with tool execution

completed.name: Dashboard & Issue Detection
completed.description: Overview dashboard with server/app stats, issue detection (high CPU, offline, failed deploys)

completed.name: API & Token Auth
completed.description: REST API with bearer token authentication for external integrations

completed.name: Production Readiness - Schema Fix
completed.description: Fixed schema mismatches: added ssh_key_id/metrics_updated_at to servers, app_id/started_at/completed_at to deployments, added ActionCable deploy streaming

planned.name: Native Puma Deployment (non-Docker)
planned.description: Deploy Rails apps via Puma/systemd instead of Docker, using the built-in provisioning scripts

planned.name: Caddy Reverse Proxy Configuration
planned.description: Auto-configure Caddy on remote servers for SSL termination and reverse proxy to apps

planned.name: Scheduled Backup Jobs
planned.description: Solid Queue recurring jobs for automated backup execution based on schedule settings

planned.name: Server Health Monitoring Jobs
planned.description: Periodic server metrics collection and alerting via scheduled jobs

planned.name: Multi-App Server Management
planned.description: Port allocation, resource limits, and conflict detection for multiple apps per server

planned.name: Deployment Rollback
planned.description: One-click rollback to previous deployment with container/release management

planned.name: Log Streaming & Aggregation
planned.description: Real-time log tailing from remote servers via SSH, with search and filtering
